displayNameZh: 工具选择标准：免费额度多且效果好
summary: Yt Tool Selection component for Remotion.
summaryZh: 适用于 Remotion 的「工具选择标准：免费额度多且效果好」组件。

artifact.usageMarkdown: Copy `remotion/yt-tool-selection/src/YtToolSelection.tsx` into your Remotion project, import `YtToolSelection` and `ytToolSelectionDefaultProps`, then register the composition.
artifact.agentPrompt: Add the Yt Tool Selection Remotion asset from remotionhub/remotionhub-assets at remotion/yt-tool-selection to my project. Preserve the exported YtToolSelectionProps API and register the YtToolSelection composition with the default props.
